chants.title: One Nil to the Arsenal
chants.lyrics:
One nil to the Arsenal
One nil to the Arsenal
One nil to the Arsenal
One nil to the Arsenal
chants.tuneName: Go West (Pet Shop Boys / Village People)
chants.contextNotes: Sung when leading 1-0. One of the most recognisable Arsenal chants.

chants.title: We All Follow the Arsenal
chants.lyrics:
We all follow the Arsenal
Over land and sea (and Leicester!)
We all follow the Arsenal
On to victory
chants.contextNotes: A terrace staple since the 1970s. The Leicester line was added as a joke and stuck.

chants.title: 49 Undefeated
chants.lyrics:
Forty-nine, forty-nine undefeated
Forty-nine, forty-nine I say
Forty-nine, forty-nine undefeated
Playing football the Arsenal way

chants.title: Saka and Emile Smith Rowe
chants.lyrics:
Saka and Emile Smith Rowe
Saka and Emile Smith Rowe
Saka and Emile Smith Rowe
Na na na na na na na
chants.contextNotes: Started when Saka and Smith Rowe broke through together. Still sung for Saka.

chants.title: He's Declan Rice
chants.lyrics:
He's Declan Rice
He's Declan Rice
He left the Hammers cos they're shite
He's Declan Rice
chants.contextNotes: Adopted after Rice's transfer from West Ham in 2023.
